message:
refactor(trace): make CrashPackBuilder::build() fallible and expand streaming tests

CrashPack: `build()` now returns `Result<CrashPack, CrashPackBuildError>`
instead of panicking when `failure` metadata is missing. New
`CrashPackBuildError::MissingFailure` error type with Display and Error
impls. All call sites updated — most use `.expect()` or `?` where failure
is known to be set, while `LabRuntime` gracefully logs and returns None.
Updated builder tests to use `.unwrap()` on the new Result type. Tests
added for the missing-failure error path.

Streaming: Expanded test coverage for streaming trace infrastructure
including span lifecycle tracking, event recording, and subscriber
integration patterns.

Lab Runtime: `LabRuntime::build_crash_pack` now handles the fallible
builder by logging an error and returning None instead of propagating
a panic from a missing failure section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
